name: NEUTRA CORP.
summary: PART I Overview Neutra Corp. was incorporated in Nevada on January 11, 2011 to market and participate in the nutraceutical space by bringing products derived from all natural and organic origins. On August 16, 2019, Neutra Corp. reincorporated in Wyoming. Along with participating in the actual nutraceutical products, we plan to research and bring new technology to the nutraceutical space.
